category_sources: Official README says jabba is a Java Version Manager and aims to install and switch JDK versions across operating systems.
source_facts.description says Cross-platform Java Version Manager.
docs_sources: Official repository README contains installation, usage, development, and FAQ sections.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already contains https://github.com/Jabba-Team/jabba, so repo is returned as null per instructions.
tags_sources: Official README documents installing and switching between different JDK versions on macOS, Linux, and Windows.
source_facts.description identifies a cross-platform Java version manager.
